subcodes.first_line: The atoms themselves have witnessed My rising in the Cause, when trembling seized all the dwellers of the earth save whom He willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الذرات بقیامی علی الامر اذ اخذ الاضطراب سکان الارض کلها الا من شاء
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
